actions: Found P1: JS syntax error in renderGames — stray backtick from UX/UI keyboard accessibility commit broke entire script block

Verified all 5 games render cards and load with canvas (Snake, Pong, Breakout, Space Invaders, Tetris)
Verified CSP bug fix (relative /api URLs work, 5 games returned)
LAN accessibility check: no hardcoded localhost in frontend source
Updated test plan notes for Space Invaders and Tetris (removed stale P1 references)
